data.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum Options Expiry Highlights Market Volatility
data.description: According to PANews, data from Greeks.live indicates that 26,000 Bitcoin options and 220,000 Ethereum options have recently expired, with the maximum pain points at $84,000 and $1,850, respectively. Implied volatility has risen significantly, with Bitcoin's term volatility exceeding 50% and Ethereum's remaining around 65%. Market sentiment is subdued, and the probability of a black swan event has increased, as the proportion of bearish options trading and open interest continues to grow.

data.title: Former Binance CEO Changpeng Zhao partners with Kyrgyzstan to advance blockchain and crypto infrastructure
data.description:
4-4-2025 – Former Binance chief executive Changpeng Zhao has forged a strategic alliance with Kyrgyzstan’s National Investment Agency, marking a pivotal shift in the nation’s approach to blockchain technology and cryptocurrency governance. The mountainous republic, blessed with abundant hydroelectric resources, is steadily emerging as an appealing destination for cryptocurrency mining operations, with water-generated power contributing [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/former-binance-ceo-changpeng-zhao-partners-with-kyrgyzstan-to-advance-blockchain-and-crypto-infrastructure/
